message:
refactor(net): widen visibility of remove_stale_socket_file to pub(crate)

Change remove_stale_socket_file from module-private to pub(crate) so
other modules within the crate can reuse the stale Unix socket cleanup
logic (check symlink_metadata for socket type, then remove_file)
without duplicating the implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
